name: Legal definition
description: The treaty defines the border through a moving river.

name: Permanent fixing
description: The 1926 line remains fixed while the river later changes.

name: Divergence
description: The watercourse and official line no longer coincide.

name: Ambiguous territory
description: Space forms between the fixed line and current river.

name: Fortification
description: Fences and surveillance infrastructure reinforce the border.

name: Abandonment
description: Stranded groups are left where responsibility is denied.

name: Counter-cartography
description: The platform reconnects legal, spatial, and temporal evidence.
